name: PixelForge
tagline: Professional design tools for teams that move fast
metaDescription: PixelForge replaces Canva Pro with templates, brand kits, background removal, and team collaboration — all included in your AppBuster subscription.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">🎨</text></svg>

features.title: Drag-and-Drop Editor
features.desc: Build social posts, presentations, and marketing materials with an intuitive canvas editor. No design skills required — just drag elements into place and publish.

features.title: Brand Kit
features.desc: Store your logos, color palettes, and brand fonts in one central kit. Every new design automatically pulls from your brand guidelines to keep visuals consistent.

features.title: Background Removal
features.desc: Remove backgrounds from product photos and headshots with one click. The AI-powered tool handles complex edges like hair and transparent objects cleanly.

features.title: Template Library
features.desc: Access thousands of professionally designed templates for Instagram stories, YouTube thumbnails, email headers, flyers, and more. Customize any template in minutes.

features.title: Team Collaboration
features.desc: Share designs with teammates for feedback and co-editing in real time. Leave comments directly on the canvas and track version history for every asset.

features.title: Multi-Format Export
features.desc: Export designs as PNG, JPG, SVG, PDF, or MP4 video. Choose resolution presets optimized for print, web, or social media platforms.

includes: Brand kit with logo and fonts
